name: DemandHub
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

DemandHub helps you win more customers by boosting your online reviews with minimal effort. Monitor and respond to the reviews as they come in, showing your customers you care about what they say.
‍

Source: Website

Features:

➡️Monitor and respond to all the reviews under a single dashboard

➡️Offers message templates 

➡️Alerts and notifications for incoming reviews

Pros:

✅Has built-in auto responders for reviews 

✅Offers specific response templates

✅Multi-language support 

Cons:

❌ Not very user friendly

Offers Custom Pricing
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

“DemandHub has greatly helped increase my Google Reviews. Their quick chat widget added another helpful piece to my website and has led to several new leads. Sometimes the interface can be glitchy. We have it set up so that incoming messages come up as desktop notifications. Sometimes there is a huge delay in when the message has come in and when we are notified. We also find that we often have to refresh the page to see new messages.”

*Review sourced and cited by G2*
